00739|   const loadBatchWalletTokens = async () => {
00740|     if (!batchChain) return

00767| 
00768|         // Always fetch native balance first

00780|               },

00782|               balanceFormatted: formatUnits(nativeBalance, chain.currency.decimals),
00783|             })
00784|           }
00785|         } catch (e) {
00786|           console.warn('Failed to fetch native balance:', e)
00787|         }
00788| 
00789|         // Try Alchemy alchemy_getTokenBalances via direct RPC fetch (works with demo key)
00790|         let alchemyTokenAddresses: string[] = []

00792|           const alchemyNetwork = getAlchemyNetwork(chain.id)
00793|           // Build Alchemy RPC URL
00794|           const alchemyApiKey = alchemySettings.apiKey || 'demo'

00802|               method: 'alchemy_getTokenBalances',

00805|           })
00806|           const data = await res.json()

00811|           }
00812|         } catch (e) {
00813|           console.warn('Alchemy RPC not available for this chain, falling back to Relay list:', e)

00815| 
00816|         // Fetch Relay default currency list for metadata
00817|         const relayCurrencies = await relayAPI.getCurrencies({ chainIds: [chain.id], defaultList: true, limit: 200 })
00818|         const relayCurrencyMap = new Map(relayCurrencies.map(c => [c.address.toLowerCase(), c]))
00819|

00821|           name: 'balanceOf', type: 'function', stateMutability: 'view',

00823|           outputs: [{ name: 'balance', type: 'uint256' }],
00824|         }] as const
00825| 
00826|         if (alchemyTokenAddresses.length > 0) {

00832|           )
00833|           for (let i = 0; i < alchemyTokenAddresses.length; i++) {
